question: Can the simpler TRXUSDT always-long monthly 60-day volatility target at 10% annual risk remain post-cost and post-hurdle positive with bounded drawdown in a fresh 2025-2026 confirmation?
evidence_boundary: Development 2021-2022 and evaluation 2023-2024 are exposed calibration. Only confirmation 2025-2026-06 is fresh.
calibration_gate: development and evaluation each: stress after hurdle >0; max drawdown >-15% and better than unscaled 0.5x passive; 8%/12% target returns >0; data PASS
confirmation_gate: stress after hurdle >0; both year slices positive; max drawdown >-10% and better than unscaled passive; 8%/12% target returns >=0; data PASS
